overview.description: Open-source full-stack TypeScript framework, AI-powered SaaS products, and custom business applications
overview.description_long: Contember is a Prague & Dublin-based team that builds open-source frameworks, AI-powered products, and custom business applications. Their core product is the Contember Framework — an open-source, full-stack TypeScript platform that auto-generates GraphQL APIs, auth, and admin UIs from a data model. They also ship Nua Site (AI-powered website editing by chat) and Redo My Site (AI rebuilds websites with Astro + Tailwind). Their services arm delivers custom CRMs, ERPs, internal tools, and AI-powered apps for clients in manufacturing, logistics, finance, e-commerce, and publishing.
overview.tagline: We build tools that change how the web gets made.

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague when the team got tired of rebuilding the same boilerplate on every project — auth, permissions, APIs, database migrations. Built Contember Framework to solve the problem, then started shipping client apps and SaaS products on top of it.

key_milestones.event: GitHub organisation created; early development of Contember framework begins
Contember open-source repo created on GitHub
Company officially established in Prague & Dublin as Contember Limited
Started taking on client custom application projects using the framework
Launched Nua Site (AI-powered website editor) and Redo My Site (AI website rebuilder)

metadata.notes: Small bootstrapped team (~11-50 people). Mixed business model: open-source framework (Apache 2.0), two SaaS products (Nua Site, Redo My Site), and consulting/custom app development. GitHub org created 2019 but company officially est. 2021. 1000+ apps built according to website. Main repo has 181 GitHub stars. No public funding rounds found. No Glassdoor presence found.
